caption:

title: Don't make smaller games. Make subtracted ones.

title: Usage fees mean inference costs won

title: Steam reviews are a bug tracker with leverage

caption:

caption:
RTX 5090 reportedly jumping to $5,000. Consumer GPUs aren't priced for gamers anymore — they're priced against datacenter demand for the same fabs. PC gaming's real rival isn't consoles, it's inference.

title: $2,000 to $5,000: the GPU is now an AI asset class

#AI #MachineLearning #LLM #Threadverse #Tech
title: The capex just moved from training to serving

caption:
Being consistent isn't a virtue, it's just cheaper than being right. Holding one view for ten years feels like integrity, but it might only mean you stopped updating. A mind that never contradicts its past self quit learning in public.

title: Being consistent isn't a virtue, it's just cheap

title: Whoever owns the grader owns the benchmark
